queries.question: Show life insurances and annuities with the payout of 100000.0.
queries.sql:
SELECT life_insurances.policy_number as number
FROM life_insurances
WHERE life_insurances.payout = 100000.0
UNION
SELECT annuities.contract_number as number
FROM annuities
WHERE annuities.payout = 100000.0
